title: delta_correlation signal eliminated: one-way design is anti-signal

content.finding: delta_correlation one-way design (only decrease eta when correlation degrades) systematically suppresses eta because successful adaptation changes error-push correlation, which the signal misinterprets as degradation. More alpha_meta = more damage. The signal is anti-correlated with desired behavior.
content.evidence: All 3 alpha_meta values show negative improvement: -0.0034 (0.01), -0.0149 (0.05), -0.0231 (0.1). Monotonically worse with stronger coupling.
content.implication: One-way adaptation designs that only reduce eta are dangerous - they cannot distinguish between correlation changes from successful adaptation vs genuine degradation.

constraints_implied: One-way eta reduction based on error-push correlation is an anti-signal for this system
